sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6119" key="a)mfitroxo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιτροχόω</orth>, <sense id="n6119.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run round, encompass,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀμφιτροχώσας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0548.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:9:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9.12</biblScope></bibl></cit>, prob. from a poet.</sense> </entryFree>
